functions.name: RATE
functions.description: Returns the CAD exchange rate for a currency from the Bank of Canada. Rate = CAD per 1 unit of the given currency.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for the latest available rate.

functions.name: MONTHLY_AVG
functions.description: Returns the monthly average CAD exchange rate from the Bank of Canada.

functions.name: ANNUAL_AVG
functions.description: Returns the annual average CAD exchange rate from the Bank of Canada.

functions.name: TO_CAD
functions.description: Converts a foreign currency amount to CAD using the Bank of Canada rate.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for the latest rate.

functions.name: FROM_CAD
functions.description: Converts a CAD amount to a foreign currency using the Bank of Canada rate.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for the latest rate.

functions.name: RATE_DATE
functions.description: Returns the actual date of the rate used. Useful when the requested date falls on a weekend or holiday.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Optional date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit for the latest rate.
